workExperiences.name: Oasis Info Byte
workExperiences.description:
Worked as a Full Stack Web Developer on multiple projects, including responsive UI and full-stack applications using HTML, CSS, Tailwind CSS, JavaScript, React.js, MongoDB, Express.js, and Node.js.


Developed key projects such as a Landing Page, Pizza Delivery Website, and Weather App during the internship, focusing on clean UI, responsiveness, and user experience.

workExperiences.name: FreeLance IT LAB
workExperiences.description:
Worked as a React Frontend Developer, contributed to the development of an online education platform. Built reusable and responsive UI components to enhance user experience and ensure seamless navigation.


Collaborated with backend teams and focused on delivering high-quality, user-friendly interfaces aligned with business requirements.

workExperiences.name: ICICI Bank
workExperiences.description:
Currently working as a Full Stack Developer, building secure and scalable business applications using modern technologies.


Frontend: Developed dynamic and responsive UI using React.js, including admin dashboards with role-based access control (RBAC).


Integration Layer: Designed and implemented a Node.js-based integration layer to avoid direct exposure of backend services. Handled API orchestration, request validation, and secure communication between frontend and backend systems.


Backend: Built high-performance APIs using FastAPI (Python) with PostgreSQL, focusing on scalability and efficient data handling.


Additionally, gained hands-on experience in cloud technologies, including application deployment, writing YAML configurations, and managing production-ready environments.
